title: phyla × intermedia
intro: Phyla × intermedia, also known as Texas frogfruit, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, thanks to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Phyla × intermedia has been used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from fever reduction to skin conditions.
